pack.label: Tax Management
pack.inputVerb: Add tax documents or client files

intents.label: Sort tax documents by client and year

w2_forms.label: W-2 forms
w2_forms.description: Wage and withholding statements per employer.

forms_1099.label: 1099 forms
forms_1099.description: Miscellaneous, interest, dividends, NEC, retirement, and related1099s.

forms_1098.label: 1098 forms
forms_1098.description: Mortgage interest, tuition, and other 1098 statements.

schedules_estimates.label: Schedules & estimates
schedules_estimates.description: Schedule attachments and estimated tax payments.

prior_returns.label: Prior returns
prior_returns.description: Archived or amended returns for reference.

client_correspondence.label: Client & agency correspondence
client_correspondence.description: Letters from tax agencies, CPAs, or clients.

other_documents.label: Other documents
other_documents.description: Supporting tax files that do not fit a specific bucket.
